allow: PowerShell($dotnet = Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($dotnet\) { $dotnet.Source } else { Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\dotnet\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 })
